📊 Composite Scoring Methodology

30 police units evaluated across 15 parameters from 9 Smart Policing applications. Raw values normalized to 0–100 using min-max normalization. Lower-is-better parameters are inverted. NATGRID and CriMAC are √-transformed. Null: 0 for activity metrics, 50 (neutral) for structural metrics. Final score = weighted average of all 15 normalized scores.

Parameter Weights
# Parameter Category Wt Type Direction
1 MedLEaPR PME MedLEaPR 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
2 MedLEaPR MLC MedLEaPR 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
3 NATGRID (Gandiva+Sudarshan) NATGRID 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
4 DGP Dashboard CCTNS 5% Cumulative ⬆ Higher=Better
5 CCTNS Overall Forms Entry CCTNS 5% Cumulative ⬆ Higher=Better
6 CCTNS Weekly Forms IIF 1-7 CCTNS 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
7 CCTNS Weekly Forms IIF 8-15 CCTNS 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
8 Citizen Portal Pending% Citizen Portal 5% Cumulative ⬆ Higher=Better
9 eSakshya SID% eSakshya 5% Cumulative ⬆ Higher=Better
10 CriMAC (PS%+Alerts/FIR) CriMAC 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
11 CEIR Score CEIR 5% Cumulative ⬆ Higher=Better
12 eProsecution (PS%+Requests) eProsecution 10% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
13 FIRs & CS Consumed in Court FIRs & CS 5% Cumulative ⬆ Higher=Better
14 eOffice (Files+Speed) eOffice 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
15 APOLIS (Downloads+APR+ACR) APOLIS 5% Cumulative ⬆ Higher=Better
16 Drone Flying Hours Drones 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
17 Dial112 Tabs Online% Dial 112 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
18 Dial112 Resp.Time Dial 112 5% Weekly ⬇ Lower=Better
19 CCTV360 Usage CCTV360 5% Weekly ⬆ Higher=Better
TOTAL100%
⚠️ Known Limitations
  • Markapuram & Polavaram — newly formed districts; parent district values used as proxy where own data is unavailable.
  • CCTNS Forms/FIR — inflated for small units. Capped at 15.
  • ASR & Polavaram Dial 112 RT — hilly terrain (verified). Capped at 30 min for scoring equity.
  • MedLEaPR MLC% — hospital non-adoption, not unit negligence.
  • eSakshya SID% — till-date %; units clearing backlog.
  • Dial 112 — GRP units have no control rooms; assigned neutral (50).
  • No crime outcome data — scoring reflects technology adoption only.
🔵 Grade Scale
A: ≥ 75 B: 62–74 C: 49–61 D: 36–48 E: < 36
Data: Smart Policing Performance Report — 30.04.2026  ·  Scoring Model v3.0  ·  30 Units · 19 Parameters
